title: eleiotis sororia
intro: Eleiotis sororia, also known as Desert Four O'Clock, is a species of flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, and its medicinal properties include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eleiotis sororia include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting immune function, making it a potential remedy for conditions such as fever, sore throats, and wounds. Herbal preparations of Eleiotis sororia can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's roots and stems to create a tincture or salve.
